evals.prompt: Run a Mode 1 autonomous trend scan for the upcoming week: `python3 scripts/trend_research.py scan --week 2026-W18`
evals.expected_output: Claude runs 6 WebSearches (2 per pillar across LP Craft, Solo Ops, Paid Media). Synthesizes 3-6 candidates per pillar. Dedupes against existing idea-bank entries (70% text-overlap threshold). Drops candidates with relevance_score <3 or anti-pattern words. Appends survivors to idea-bank.json with type: trend.

assertions.name: three_pillars_covered
assertions.description: WebSearch executed for all 3 pillars (LP Craft, Solo Ops, Paid Media)

assertions.name: candidates_per_pillar
assertions.description: 3-6 raw candidates synthesized per pillar before dedupe and quality filter

assertions.name: dedupe_applied
assertions.description: No survivor's seed text overlaps >70% with an existing idea-bank entry's seed/raw_note/hook_candidate

assertions.name: quality_filter_applied
assertions.description: All survivors have relevance_score >=3 and contain no em dashes / hype words from voice-guide

assertions.name: schema_compliant
assertions.description: Each appended entry has: id (uuid), type=trend, pillar, seed, hook_candidate, source_urls, tags, relevance_score, via=trend-research, captured_at, status=raw

evals.prompt: Run trend ingest with a candidate whose seed text overlaps 90% with an existing idea-bank entry.
evals.expected_output: Dedupe logic identifies the overlap and skips the candidate. Logs 'skipped: duplicate of <existing_id>' to scan log. Does NOT append duplicate to idea-bank.json.

assertions.name: duplicate_skipped
assertions.description: Candidate with >70% seed overlap is not appended to idea-bank.json

assertions.name: skip_reason_logged
assertions.description: Scan log records skipped candidate with reference to the existing entry id it duplicated

assertions.name: no_silent_loss
assertions.description: Skipped candidate is visible in scan-log.md so user can see what was rejected and why
